title: Mambo
writer: Ennio De Concini, Ivo Perilli, Guido Piovene
actors: Silvana Mangano, Michael Rennie, Vittorio Gassman
plot: Silvana Mangano (a very lovely and sexy voiced actress) plays a young, poor Venetian woman, Giovanna Masetti. She is struggling with a difficult life as a shop assistant when one day the young count Enrico sees her in the glass sh...
